name: HGNC
description: The HGNC is a resource for approved human gene nomenclature containing ~42000 gene symbols and names and 1300+ gene families and sets
conditionsOfAccess: No restrictions are imposed on access to, or use of, the data provided by the HGNC, which are provided to enhance knowledge and encourage progress in the scientific community. The HGNC provides these data in good faith, but make no warranty, express or implied, nor assume any legal liability or responsibility for any purpose for which they are used.
citeAs: Seal RL, Braschi B, Gray K, McClay J, Tweedie S, Bruford EA. Genenames.org: the HGNC and PGNC resources in 2026. Nucleic Acids Res. 2025 Nov 25:gkaf1229. DOI: 10.1093/nar/gkaf1229. PMID: 41287213
citation: Seal RL, Braschi B, Gray K, McClay J, Tweedie S, Bruford EA. Genenames.org: the HGNC and PGNC resources in 2026. Nucleic Acids Res. 2025 Nov 25:gkaf1229. DOI: 10.1093/nar/gkaf1229. PMID: 41287213

funder.name: US National Human Genome Research Institute (NHGRI)

distribution.name: hgnc_complete_set_tsv
distribution.description: Complete HGNC approved dataset in tab-separated values (TSV) format. Multiple-valued fields are double-quoted and pipe-delimited within the quotes.

distribution.name: hgnc_complete_set_json
distribution.description: Complete HGNC approved dataset in JSON format (no indentation or whitespace). Intended for loading into a JSON parser within a script or program.

distribution.name: withdrawn_tsv
distribution.description: Withdrawn HGNC symbol reports in tab-separated values (TSV) format.

distribution.name: withdrawn_json
distribution.description: Withdrawn HGNC symbol reports in JSON format.

distribution.name: hgnc_owl
distribution.description: HGNC OWL file created by SciBite. Contains all genes in HGNC organised in a shallow hierarchy, classified by locus type and gene group. Includes approved gene symbol, approved gene name, previous names and symbols, and mappings to external databases.

distribution.name: gene_groups_tsv
distribution.description: Complete HGNC gene groups dataset in tab-separated values (TSV) format, containing all genes assigned to gene groups with their group associations.

distribution.name: gene_groups_json
distribution.description: Complete HGNC gene groups dataset in JSON format.

recordSet.name: hgnc_complete_set
recordSet.description: Complete HGNC approved gene symbol dataset. Each record represents one approved human gene locus with its symbol, name, locus information, cross-references to external databases, and nomenclature history.

field.name: hgnc_id
field.description: HGNC ID. A unique ID created by the HGNC for every approved symbol.

field.name: symbol
field.description: The HGNC approved gene symbol. Equates to the Approved symbol field within the gene symbol report.

field.name: name
field.description: HGNC approved name for the gene. Equates to the Approved name field within the gene symbol report.

field.name: locus_group
field.description: A group name for a set of related locus types as defined by the HGNC (e.g. non-coding RNA).

field.name: locus_type
field.description: The locus type as set by the HGNC.

field.name: status
field.description: Status of the symbol report, which can be either Approved or Entry Withdrawn.

field.name: location
field.description: Cytogenetic location of the gene (e.g. 2q34).

field.name: location_sortable
field.description: Same as location but single digit chromosomes are prefixed with a 0 enabling them to be sorted in correct numerical order (e.g. 02q34).

field.name: alias_symbol
field.description: Other symbols used to refer to this gene as seen in the Alias symbols field in the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: alias_name
field.description: Other names used to refer to this gene as seen in the Alias names field in the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: prev_symbol
field.description: Gene symbols previously approved by the HGNC for this gene. Equates to the Previous symbols field within the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: prev_name
field.description: Gene names previously approved by the HGNC for this gene. Equates to the Previous names field within the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: gene_group
field.description: The gene group name as set by the HGNC and seen at the top of the gene group reports. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: gene_group_id
field.description: ID used to designate a gene group the gene has been assigned to. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: date_approved_reserved
field.description: The date the entry was first approved.

field.name: date_symbol_changed
field.description: The date the approved symbol was last changed.

field.name: date_name_changed
field.description: The date the approved name was last changed.

field.name: date_modified
field.description: Date the entry was last modified.

field.name: entrez_id
field.description: NCBI gene ID. Found within the Gene resources section of the gene symbol report.

field.name: ensembl_gene_id
field.description: Ensembl gene ID. Found within the Gene resources section of the gene symbol report.

field.name: vega_id
field.description: Vega gene ID. Found within the Gene resources section of the gene symbol report.

field.name: ucsc_id
field.description: UCSC gene ID. Found within the Gene resources section of the gene symbol report.

field.name: ena
field.description: International Nucleotide Sequence Database Collaboration (GenBank, ENA and DDBJ) accession number(s). Found within the Nucleotide resources section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: refseq_accession
field.description: RefSeq nucleotide accession(s). Found within the Nucleotide resources section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: ccds_id
field.description: Consensus CDS ID. Found within the Nucleotide resources section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: uniprot_ids
field.description: UniProt protein accession. Found within the Protein resource section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: pubmed_id
field.description: Pubmed and Europe Pubmed Central PMID(s). Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: mgd_id
field.description: Mouse genome informatics database ID. Found within the Homologs section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: rgd_id
field.description: Rat genome database gene ID. Found within the Homologs section of the gene symbol report. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: lsdb
field.description: The name of the Locus Specific Mutation Database and URL for the gene separated by a | character, e.g. Mutations of the ATP-binding Cassette Transporter Retina|http://www.retina-international.org/files/sci-news/abcrmut.htm. Multiple entries pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: cosmic
field.description: Symbol used within the Catalogue of somatic mutations in cancer for the gene. (No longer updated!).

field.name: omim_id
field.description: Online Mendelian Inheritance in Man (OMIM) ID. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: mirbase
field.description: miRBase ID.

field.name: homeodb
field.description: Homeobox Database ID.

field.name: snornabase
field.description: snoRNABase ID.

field.name: bioparadigms_slc
field.description: Symbol used to link to the SLC tables database at bioparadigms.org for the gene.

field.name: orphanet
field.description: Orphanet ID.

field.name: pseudogene_org
field.description: Pseudogene.org ID.

field.name: horde_id
field.description: Symbol used within HORDE for the gene.

field.name: merops
field.description: ID used to link to the MEROPS peptidase database.

field.name: imgt
field.description: Symbol used within international ImMunoGeneTics information system. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: iuphar
field.description: The objectId used to link to the IUPHAR/BPS Guide to PHARMACOLOGY database.

field.name: kznf_gene_catalog
field.description: Column present in the TSV file header; no description found on the data dictionary help page.

field.name: mamit_trnadb
field.description: ID to link to the Mamit-tRNA database.

field.name: cd
field.description: Symbol used within the Human Cell Differentiation Molecule database for the gene.

field.name: lncrnadb
field.description: lncRNA Database ID - Resource is now defunct.

field.name: enzyme_id
field.description: ENZYME EC accession number. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: intermediate_filament_db
field.description: ID used to link to the Human Intermediate Filament Database.

field.name: rna_central_id
field.description: RNAcentral ID. Multiple values pipe-delimited within double quotes.

field.name: lncipedia
field.description: The gene symbol used for a gene report within LNCipedia - A comprehensive compendium of human long non-coding RNAs.

field.name: gtrnadb
field.description: GtRNAdb (Genomic tRNA Database) ID.

field.name: agr
field.description: The HGNC ID that the Alliance of Genome Resources (AGR) have linked to their record of the gene.

field.name: mane_select
field.description: NCBI and Ensembl transcript IDs/accessions including the version number for one high-quality representative transcript per protein-coding gene that is well-supported by experimental data and represents the biology of the gene. The IDs are delimited by |.

field.name: gencc
field.description: The HGNC ID used within the GenCC database as the unique identifier of their gene reports.

recordSet.name: withdrawn
recordSet.description: Withdrawn HGNC symbol reports. Each record represents a symbol that has been withdrawn, with its withdrawal status and any symbol it was merged into.

field.name: HGNC_ID
field.description: HGNC ID. A unique ID created by the HGNC for every approved symbol.

field.name: STATUS
field.description: Status of the withdrawn symbol report.

field.name: WITHDRAWN_SYMBOL
field.description: The gene symbol that was withdrawn.

field.name: merged_into_reports
field.description: The HGNC ID, symbol, and status of the report(s) this withdrawn entry was merged into, formatted as HGNC_ID|SYMBOL|STATUS. Multiple entries pipe-delimited.

recordSet.name: gene_groups
recordSet.description: HGNC gene groups dataset. Each record represents one gene assigned to a gene group, with its nomenclature and group association details.

field.name: HGNC_ID
field.description: HGNC ID. A unique ID created by the HGNC for every approved symbol.

field.name: Approved_symbol
field.description: The HGNC approved gene symbol.

field.name: Approved_name
field.description: HGNC approved name for the gene.

field.name: Status
field.description: Status of the symbol report.

field.name: Locus_type
field.description: The locus type as set by the HGNC.

field.name: Previous_symbols
field.description: Gene symbols previously approved by the HGNC for this gene.

field.name: Alias_symbols
field.description: Other symbols used to refer to this gene.

field.name: Chromosome
field.description: Chromosome on which the gene is located.

field.name: NCBI_Gene_ID
field.description: NCBI gene ID.

field.name: Ensembl_gene_ID
field.description: Ensembl gene ID.

field.name: Vega_gene_ID
field.description: Vega gene ID.

field.name: Group_ID
field.description: ID used to designate the gene group.

field.name: Group_name
field.description: The gene group name as set by the HGNC.
